text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion finds that her strength and status are
attracting a lot of attention to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those closest to Fine Motion, including her friend
Daiwa Scarlet, worry for her, but she takes the
attention in good humor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reserved Zenno Rob Roy soon reaches out to
Fine Motion as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, I realize that there's more to Fine
Motion than her family's stature alone. She also
possesses an uncanny ability to charm anyone and
everyone.
